Interface AutosaveSnapshotDao

public interface AutosaveSnapshotDao
Data Access Object (DAO) interface for AutosaveSnapshot entity. Declares CRUD operations for managing autosave snapshots. Note: Snapshots are generally immutable once created, so no update operations are provided.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    LiveData<Integer>
    countByProject(long projectId)
    Gets the count of autosave snapshots for a specific project.
    int
    delete(AutosaveSnapshot snapshot)
    Deletes an autosave snapshot from the database.
    int
    delete(AutosaveSnapshot... snapshots)
    Deletes multiple autosave snapshots from the database.
    int
    deleteByProject(long projectId)
    Deletes all autosave snapshots for a specific project.
    int
    deleteOlderThan(long projectId, long snapshotId)
    Deletes autosave snapshots older than a specific snapshot ID for a project.
    int
    deleteOldSnapshots(long projectId, int keepCount)
    Deletes old autosave snapshots for a project, keeping only the most recent N snapshots.

    getTotalSizeByProject(long projectId)
    Gets the total storage size (in bytes) used by autosave snapshots for a specific project.

    Retrieves the most recent autosave snapshot for a specific project.

    Retrieves a limited number of recent autosave snapshots for a specific project.

  • Method Details

    • insert

      long insert(AutosaveSnapshot snapshot)
      Inserts a single autosave snapshot into the database.
      Parameters:
      snapshot - AutosaveSnapshot instance to insert.
      Returns:
      ID of the newly inserted snapshot.

    • insert

      List<Long> insert(Collection<AutosaveSnapshot> snapshots)
      Inserts multiple autosave snapshots into the database.
      Parameters:
      snapshots - Collection of snapshots to insert.
      Returns:
      List of IDs of the newly inserted snapshots.

    • insert

      List<Long> insert(AutosaveSnapshot... snapshots)
      Inserts multiple autosave snapshots into the database.
      Parameters:
      snapshots - Variable number of snapshots to insert.
      Returns:
      List of IDs of the newly inserted snapshots.

    • delete

      int delete(AutosaveSnapshot snapshot)
      Deletes an autosave snapshot from the database.
      Parameters:
      snapshot - AutosaveSnapshot instance to delete.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.

    • delete

      int delete(AutosaveSnapshot... snapshots)
      Deletes multiple autosave snapshots from the database.
      Parameters:
      snapshots - Variable number of snapshots to delete.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.

    • select

      LiveData<AutosaveSnapshot> select(long snapshotId)
      Retrieves an autosave snapshot by its ID.
      Parameters:
      snapshotId - Snapshot ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the snapshot, or null if not found.

    • selectByProject

      LiveData<List<AutosaveSnapshot>> selectByProject(long projectId)
      Retrieves all autosave snapshots for a specific project, ordered by creation time (most recent first).
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of snapshots for the specified project.

    • selectMostRecent

      LiveData<AutosaveSnapshot> selectMostRecent(long projectId)
      Retrieves the most recent autosave snapshot for a specific project.
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the most recent snapshot, or null if none exist.

    • selectRecentByProject

      LiveData<List<AutosaveSnapshot>> selectRecentByProject(long projectId, int limit)
      Retrieves a limited number of recent autosave snapshots for a specific project.
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID.
      limit - Maximum number of snapshots to retrieve.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of recent snapshots.

    • countByProject

      LiveData<Integer> countByProject(long projectId)
      Gets the count of autosave snapshots for a specific project.
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the number of snapshots for the project.

    • getTotalSizeByProject

      LiveData<Long> getTotalSizeByProject(long projectId)
      Gets the total storage size (in bytes) used by autosave snapshots for a specific project.
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the total file size in bytes.

    • deleteByProject

      int deleteByProject(long projectId)
      Deletes all autosave snapshots for a specific project.
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.

    • deleteOldSnapshots

      int deleteOldSnapshots(long projectId, int keepCount)
      Deletes old autosave snapshots for a project, keeping only the most recent N snapshots.
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID.
      keepCount - Number of recent snapshots to keep.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.

    • deleteOlderThan

      int deleteOlderThan(long projectId, long snapshotId)
      Deletes autosave snapshots older than a specific snapshot ID for a project.
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID.
      snapshotId - Snapshot ID threshold (snapshots older than this will be deleted).
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.
